reviews.comment:
el 16 de febrero a las 13 hrs pare a cargar nafta me pasaron la tarjeta de debito varias veces y luego de bastante tiempo me dijeron que no habia sistema y me cobraron efectivo, luego al mirar los movimientos en el banco, me lo habian cobrado con débito, o sea me cobraron 2 veces

(Translated by Google)
On February 16th at 1:00 PM I stopped to get gas. They used my debit card several times and after a long time they told me there was no system and they charged me cash. Then when I checked the transactions at the bank, they had charged me with a debit card, that is, they charged me twice.

reviewReply.comment: Por favor comuníquese con los teléfonos de contacto. Si hubo un error lo solucionaremos, este no es el medio. Gracias

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcXREc3p3RRAB
